title: Not able to change pulse email anymore, only updates from Users?
excerpt: I use the send-an-email-to-update-item feature frequently.  However, today when trying to update that email address, (i) it seems we can no longer customize the email, and (ii) that only Monday.com users can update via e…

posts.author: carolinefox (Caroline F)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use the send-an-email-to-update-item feature frequently. However, today when trying to update that email address, (i) it seems we can no longer customize the email, and (ii) that only Monday.com users can update via email now?

Am I missing something?

posts.author: GoldNetAU (Shaun Morgan)
posts.cookedHtml: I know I am definitely missing something. this has happened overnight. Can any support person advise on what is going on?

posts.author: russadk (Russ)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a very disappointing change. It is important to be able to set your own email address for boards and items. When using an email program that autofills an email address, now it is very difficult to use that option to email to a board or pulse that you use repetitively without having to locate that random email address again and again.
